title: THE KING OF FIGHTERS '98 ULTIMATE MATCH FINAL EDITION

notes:
Would give this a Platinum score, if wasnt for the input delay. 
Some of you may ask: Isnt your controllers fault? No, beause i simply dont use any controllers. I run this game both on Windows and here on Ubuntu, but here i have this delay problem. It isnt a big deal because its a few frames only (i would say like, 4 or 5 frames delayed), but we are talking about a fighting game, and every frame matters. But generaly, its playable.
